description: Embedded Systems Engineer working on environmental monitoring and IoT automation solutions. Built smart circuit breakers, home automation devices, and BLE Mesh–based smart lighting systems. Experienced in ESP32, STM32, Wi-Fi, BLE, RF, and LoRa communication, along with PCB design and embedded firmware optimization for reliable and scalable industrial applications.

Embedded Systems Engineer with experience in 8051 and STM32 microcontrollers, developing real-time applications including sensor integration, motor control, and LCD interfacing. Built FreeRTOS-based systems with I2C, SD card, BLE, and Wi-Fi connectivity, along with low-power optimization and embedded firmware development.

company: Center for Intelligent and Network Research (CISNR)
description: Trainee Embedded Systems Engineer with hands-on experience in C programming for embedded applications. Worked on Arduino-based development, LCD interfacing, and I2C communication. Gained practical experience with components like DC fans and motors, focusing on stepper and DC motor control. Contributed to a plant incubator automation project involving sensing, control, and embedded system integration.

Trainee Electrical Engineer with exposure to power system fundamentals, including operation, safety protocols, and power distribution. Gained practical understanding of distribution transformers, transmission lines, and grid station equipment. Observed maintenance activities in 500KV, 220KV, and 132KV substations, including yard and transformer systems. Developed knowledge of electrical safety, system reliability, and the importance of preventive maintenance in power distribution networks.

position: Bachelor of Science in Electrical Engineering
description: Bachelor of Science in Electrical Engineering with a focus on embedded systems, microcontroller programming, and IoT applications.
